analysis.reasoning: Core message: A celebratory note on China’s Teachers’ Day, praising Chinese teachers and stating that Chinese culture respects teachers and values education. Evaluation per narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – not mentioned; no comparison to the West. CH2 (China as benevolent power) – focuses on domestic respect for teachers, not international conduct; not applicable. CH3 (epic history/adversities) – no historical struggle or resilience references; not applicable. CH4 (appropriate political system and honorable values) – implicitly promotes honorable Chinese values (respecting teachers and valuing education) in a domestic context; aligns with promoting Chinese values tied to domestic culture, fitting CH4. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – no mention of government achievements or governance outcomes; not applicable. CH6 (interesting culture/nature/heritage) – it highlights a cultural tradition (respecting teachers) and education values; this fits promoting Chinese culture/society. Conclusion: CH4 and CH6 are promoted.
